get_user_accounts: SELECT * FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = ? AND status = 'active' ORDER BY display_order, created_at, account_uuid
get_account_folders: SELECT * FROM mail_folders WHERE account_uuid = ? ORDER BY display_order, folder_name
insert_folder: INSERT INTO mail_folders (folder_uuid, account_uuid, folder_name, folder_path, folder_type) VALUES (:folder_uuid, :account_uuid, :folder_name, :folder_path, :folder_type)
get_messages: SELECT * FROM mail_messages WHERE account_uuid = ? AND folder_uuid = ? AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sent_date DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
update_message_read: UPDATE mail_messages SET is_read = ?, modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE message_uuid = ? AND account_uuid IN (SELECT account_uuid FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = ?)
update_message_pinned: UPDATE mail_messages SET is_pinned = ?, modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE message_uuid = ? AND account_uuid IN (SELECT account_uuid FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = ?)
count_unread_for_user: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM mail_messages WHERE is_read = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 AND account_uuid IN (SELECT account_uuid FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = ?)
mark_all_read_for_user: UPDATE mail_messages SET is_read = 1, modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE is_read = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 AND account_uuid IN (SELECT account_uuid FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = ?)

accounts.get_accounts: SELECT account_uuid, account_name, email, imap_host, imap_port, smtp_host, smtp_port, display_color, display_order, sync_enabled, last_sync_at, status, created_at FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = :user_uuid AND status = 'active' ORDER BY display_order, created_at
accounts.insert_account: INSERT INTO mail_accounts (account_uuid, user_uuid, account_name, email, imap_host, imap_port, imap_use_ssl, imap_username, imap_password_encrypted, smtp_host, smtp_port, smtp_use_tls, smtp_username, smtp_password_encrypted, display_color) VALUES (:account_uuid, :user_uuid, :account_name, :email, :imap_host, :imap_port, :imap_use_ssl, :imap_username, :imap_password_encrypted, :smtp_host, :smtp_port, :smtp_use_tls, :smtp_username, :smtp_password_encrypted, :display_color)
accounts.update_account: UPDATE mail_accounts SET account_name = COALESCE(:account_name, account_name), imap_password_encrypted = COALESCE(:imap_password_encrypted, imap_password_encrypted), smtp_password_encrypted = COALESCE(:smtp_password_encrypted, smtp_password_encrypted), display_color = COALESCE(:display_color, display_color), sync_enabled = COALESCE(:sync_enabled, sync_enabled) WHERE account_uuid = :account_uuid AND user_uuid = :user_uuid
accounts.remove_account: UPDATE mail_accounts SET status = 'inactive' WHERE account_uuid = :account_uuid

sync.insert_message: INSERT INTO mail_messages (message_uuid, account_uuid, folder_uuid, message_id, uid, from_email, from_name, to_emails, subject, preview, sent_date, has_attachments, body_file_path, size_bytes) VALUES (:message_uuid, :account_uuid, :folder_uuid, :message_id, :uid, :from_email, :from_name, :to_emails, :subject, :preview, :sent_date, :has_attachments, :body_file_path, :size_bytes)
sync.insert_sync_log: INSERT INTO sync_logs (log_uuid, account_uuid, sync_type, status, messages_fetched, messages_updated) VALUES (:log_uuid, :account_uuid, :sync_type, :status, :messages_fetched, :messages_updated)

inbox.get_attachment: SELECT attachment_uuid, filename, content_type, size_bytes, file_path FROM mail_attachments WHERE message_uuid = ? ORDER BY created_at
inbox.get_attachment_for_download: SELECT a.attachment_uuid, a.filename, a.content_type, a.size_bytes, a.file_path FROM mail_attachments a JOIN mail_messages m ON a.message_uuid = m.message_uuid JOIN mail_accounts ac ON m.account_uuid = ac.account_uuid WHERE a.attachment_uuid = ? AND a.message_uuid = ? AND ac.user_uuid = ?
inbox.get_sent_folder: SELECT folder_uuid FROM mail_folders WHERE account_uuid = ? AND folder_type = 'sent' LIMIT 1
inbox.create_sent_folder: INSERT INTO mail_folders (folder_uuid, account_uuid, folder_name, folder_path, folder_type) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, 'sent')
inbox.insert_sent_message: INSERT INTO mail_messages (message_uuid, account_uuid, folder_uuid, message_id, uid, from_email, from_name, to_emails, cc_emails, bcc_emails, subject, preview, sent_date, received_date, is_read, is_starred, is_deleted, has_attachments, body_file_path, size_bytes) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

gmail.get_accounts: SELECT account_uuid, account_name, email, picture, display_color, display_order, sync_enabled, last_sync_at, token_expires_at, status, created_at FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = :user_uuid AND account_type = 'gmail' AND status = 'active' ORDER BY display_order, created_at
gmail.get_account: SELECT account_uuid, email, access_token_encrypted, refresh_token_encrypted, token_expires_at FROM mail_accounts WHERE account_uuid = :account_uuid AND user_uuid = :user_uuid AND account_type = 'gmail'
gmail.get_account_by_email: SELECT account_uuid, email, account_type FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = :user_uuid AND email = :email AND status = 'active'
gmail.update_account_by_email: UPDATE mail_accounts SET account_type = 'gmail' WHERE account_uuid = :account_uuid
gmail.insert_account: INSERT INTO mail_accounts (account_uuid, user_uuid, account_type, account_name, email, access_token_encrypted, refresh_token_encrypted, token_expires_at, picture, display_color) VALUES (:account_uuid, :user_uuid, 'gmail', :account_name, :email, :access_token_encrypted, :refresh_token_encrypted, datetime('now', '+' || :token_expires_in || ' seconds'), :picture, '#EA4335')
gmail.update_tokens: UPDATE mail_accounts SET access_token_encrypted = :access_token_encrypted, refresh_token_encrypted = COALESCE(:refresh_token_encrypted, refresh_token_encrypted), token_expires_at = datetime('now', '+' || :token_expires_in || ' seconds'), modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE account_uuid = :account_uuid
gmail.update_access_token: UPDATE mail_accounts SET access_token_encrypted = :access_token_encrypted, token_expires_at = datetime('now', '+' || :token_expires_in || ' seconds'), modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE account_uuid = :account_uuid
gmail.deactivate_account: UPDATE mail_accounts SET status = 'inactive', access_token_encrypted = NULL, refresh_token_encrypted = NULL, modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE account_uuid = :account_uuid
gmail.check_token_expiry: SELECT account_uuid, email, access_token_encrypted, refresh_token_encrypted, token_expires_at, (token_expires_at <= datetime('now')) AS is_expired, (token_expires_at <= datetime('now','+5 minutes')) AS needs_refresh FROM mail_accounts WHERE account_uuid = :account_uuid AND status = 'active'

idle.get_active_sync_accounts: SELECT account_uuid, user_uuid, account_type, sync_enabled FROM mail_accounts WHERE status = 'active'
